results.reason: Note explicitly states 'Continue current ART regimen: TDF/3TC/DTG... No change indicated — viral load is suppressed' and reiterates under PMTCT Planning: 'Continue TDF/3TC/DTG throughout pregnancy, delivery, and postpartum. ART is lifelong (Option B+).'

Note states 'Next viral load should be scheduled at 34-36 weeks gestation (Contact 5) to confirm continued suppression and guide delivery planning.' Also referenced in PMTCT and Next Contact sections.

results.expectation: Infant prophylaxis or PMTCT planning mentioned
results.reason: Dedicated PMTCT Planning subsection covers infant ARV prophylaxis at birth, infant feeding (exclusive breastfeeding with ART), infant HIV testing (PCR at 6 weeks), and delivery plan based on viral suppression.

Anemia explicitly classified as 'Mild anemia' with Hb 10.8 g/dL in both the Risk Classification section ('falls in the 10.0-10.9 g/dL mild anemia range per WHO pregnancy thresholds') and Assessments section.

results.expectation: Standard iron/folate supplementation recommended alongside ART
results.reason: Iron 30-60 mg elemental iron daily recommended for mild anemia with dietary counseling, plus folic acid 400 mcg daily. Both explicitly listed under Supplementation, alongside ongoing ART under Treatment.
